hero.defaultSubtitle: A unique accommodation experience awaits you on the enchanting shores of the Aegean, where history meets the sea.

about.label: About Us
about.locationText: Thanks to our unique location opposite the marina, you can enjoy both the vibrant atmosphere of the city and the soothing tranquility of the sea.
